channel.title: Mcconnell on Wheeler Genealogy
channel.description: Recent content in Mcconnell on Wheeler Genealogy

item.title: Julia McConnell (or McConnon?) and John Carolan: The Missing Parents Mystery
item.description: John Carolan’s obituary names his wife as Julia McConnon—yet most family references use McConnell. This post gathers what we know to identify Julia’s parents.
